title: Suspect Status Visualization
changes: Add suspect-status-bar HTML in kanban header (suspect/cleared/accepted_risk counts)
Progress bar showing clearance percentage (cleared + accepted_risk / total)
Bar auto-hides when total=0, color palette: red/green/amber
Called on init and each poll data change cycle
Server: /api/suspect-links/stats endpoint already in server.js from v0.0.18
